compiled_state.title: GREEN: Update validate-work/SKILL.md to reference MAX_AGENTS protocol instead of 5 sub-agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/SKILL.md to replace "5 sub-agents" references with MAX_AGENTS protocol or orchestration.max_agents config references.

### Unit test exemption justification
1. No conditional logic — text replacement in a prompt file
2. validate-work has no eval config (promptfooconfig.yaml absent)
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — prompt text, no code execution

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No references to "5 sub-agents" in validate-work/SKILL.md
  Verify: ! grep -qi "5 sub-agents" plugins/dso/skills/validate-work/SKILL.md
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Replaced 4 references to hardcoded '5 sub-agents' in validate-work/SKILL.md with dynamic/config-driven language: (1) 'run all 5 sub-agents' → 'run all sub-agents', (2) 'X of 5 domains' → 'X of N domains', (3) 'all 5 domains PASS' → 'all domains PASS', (4) 'Max 5 sub-agents — respects the project concurrency limit' → 'Max sub-agents bounded by orchestration.max_agents — respects the project concurrency limit (see dso-config.conf)'
comments.author: Test
